reviews.review_description: Almost passed this game up because I was not sure I would like it.  Decided to give it a try anyway.  It’s a simple game to play.  Graphics are good and the movement is smooth.  It can get repetitious but still fun to play.  You move the flying saucer(taxi) to pick up bears and drop them off at their destination.  The Oculus go controller is used to pilot your taxi.   All in all a decent and fun game especially for kids.
This is a simple but beautiful and polished game, with an arcady core loop that's fun and very replayable. Hope it finds lots of players!
